creator: cb34@fureai.or.jp
text:
Status has been changed to Closed, but this error has not yet been resolved in my environment.
I changed the protobuf from 24.4_1 to 24.4_1,1 but the situation did not change.
I checked the changes in protobuf 24.4_1,1, but it appears that there is only an increased definition of PORTREVISION in the Makefile, but no processing for the Symbole in question. Was any action really taken?
